rag_rules: Use assume/guarantee syntax within annex agree blocks for component type contracts
Place implementation-level assignments in component implementation annexes only
generic_rules: Reference only visible identifiers from the current component scope in AGREE expressions
Encode concrete bounds or named constants in assumptions and guarantees for type contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be scoped to their owning component declaration
Use assign statements only for output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names as AGREE variables without explicit model exposure
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters
